values.Description: A Flash cards app created using NextJS along with authentication. Uses TailwindCSS and Next-Auth
values.Title: FlashDown

values.Description: A NextJS template that integrates, NextJS App router, Prisma ORM, DaisyUI, Next-auth, and TailwindCSS.
values.Tagline: A boilerplate for NextJS, NextAuth, DaisyUI and Prisma projects
values.Technologies: NextJS, Javascript, Prisma, DaisyUI, TailwindCSS, NextAuth
values.Title: NextJS Next-Auth Prisma DaisyUI Template

values.Description: A repository of my attempt to install and work with Passkeys (formally called WebAuthn) on NextJS with Next-Auth and MongoDB.
values.Tagline: An early implementation of Webauthn (Passkeys) in NextJS
values.Title: WebAuthn – Passkeys with NextJS

values.Description: This was a failed experiment that attempted to use a GitHub repository as a CDN for a blog. The project was written in NextJS.
values.Tagline: An experiment using GitHub as a CDN
values.Title: A NextJS Blog with GitHub as a CDN

values.Description: A simple java program to output all the slime chunks in a region in Minecraft.
values.Tagline: A simple java program to output all the slime chunks in a region in Minecraft.
values.Title: Minecraft Slime Chunk Dumper

values.Description: A new iteration of the discord auto helper bot, written in Python and uses the fuzzy search algorithm to detect and determine questions. It has a WebUI powered by flask. The bot was tested and deployed at a server hosting company discord server with over 5000 active members.
values.Tagline: A smarter implementation for automated help bots on discord
values.Title: Automated Discord Help Bot using Python

values.Description: Use this simple python program to make a file based encrypted text storage system. It uses the python cryptography module.
values.Title: IvyJournal

values.Description:
A complete overhaul of the basic IvyBot with many commands ranging from categories such as:

- Administration
- Server Information
- Bot Owner Commands
- NSFW Commands
- Discord Games
- Truth Or Dare
- ... and many more

The project was made for a personal server and has since been out of development.
values.Tagline: A Discord Bot with Many Features
values.Title: IvyBot 2.0

values.Description: A Music Discord Bot that allowed users to listen to music on Voice Channels. Built using DiscordJS
values.Tagline: A simple discord bot for music
values.Title: IvyBot

values.Description: A beautiful expense manager app built using NextJS, TailwindCSS and Prisma. Deployed with PostgreSQL on Vercel.
values.Title: IvySpence
